bundles.name: The Divergent Essentials Pack
bundles.description: Both premium systems in one pack — a complete paper productivity OS plus the full neurodivergent daily-living guide. Buy the set once and own it forever. Every individual guide page stays free to read.
includes: The Focus OS — complete paper productivity system (annual map, weekly reset, daily focus pages, habit trackers)
The Divergent Daily — full neurodivergent living guide (fuel, movement, sensory load, focus, rest, connection)
Lifetime updates — every future revision, free
